title: More Forests
description: Adds new forests to Minecraft to enhance exploration.
body:
Adds 3 new forest biomes to minecraft. This also has other features like new items and structures to be found!

These new forests include an upgraded birch forest, an upgraded oak forest, and a brand new biome called the shadow forest. Underneath the biomes a new structure can be found. It contains lots of loot including a new disk! For finding every biome the player recieves a new weapon, which is better than netherite. (for some reason)

Credits
